seo.title: Products | MEIJIA DENTAL Dental Laboratory Restorations
seo.description: Explore MEIJIA DENTAL product categories including all-ceramic restorations, PFM, implant series, cast partial frameworks, acrylic dentures, retainers and orthodontics.

hero.image_alt: Dental restoration product categories made by MEIJIA DENTAL
hero.title: Dental restorations and appliances for daily clinical workflows.
hero.subtitle: Browse product categories, then send case details through the inquiry form for material advice, lead time and sample order support.

product_list.title: Choose a product category to view the dedicated detail page.
product_list.description: Each product page includes a category introduction, product image, product details, related products and an inquiry form for quotations.

inquiry.title: Send product details for quotation and case support.
inquiry.description: Share the category, material, quantity, shade, implant system if applicable and expected delivery date. Our team will reply by email or WhatsApp.
inquiry.message_placeholder: Material, shade, delivery date, implant system or special notes
